/O.NEW.KDTX.SV.W.0070.260612T0410Z-260612T0515Z/

BULLETIN - IMMEDIATE BROADCAST REQUESTED
Severe Thunderstorm Warning
National Weather Service Detroit/Pontiac MI
1210 AM EDT Fri Jun 12 2026

The National Weather Service in Detroit/Pontiac has issued a

* Severe Thunderstorm Warning for...
  Washtenaw County in southeastern Michigan...

* Until 115 AM EDT.

* At 1210 AM EDT, severe thunderstorms were located along a line
  extending from near Brooklyn to near Clayton to near Archbold,
  moving east at 55 mph.

  HAZARD...60 mph wind gusts and penny size hail.

  SOURCE...Radar indicated.

  IMPACT...Expect damage to roofs, siding, and trees.

* Severe thunderstorms will be near...
  Manchester around 1215 AM EDT.
  Ann Arbor and Saline around 1230 AM EDT.
  Ypsilanti and Milan around 1235 AM EDT.
  Willis around 1245 AM EDT.

Other locations impacted by these severe thunderstorms include Hudson
Mills, Pittsfield Township, Whittaker, Lyndon Township, Hudson Mills
Metropark, Bridgewater, Delhi Mills, Pleasant Lake, Barton Hills, and
Pinckney State Recreation Area.

PRECAUTIONARY/PREPAREDNESS ACTIONS...

Remain alert for a possible tornado! Tornadoes can develop quickly
from severe thunderstorms. If you spot a tornado go at once into the
basement or small central room in a sturdy structure.

A Tornado Watch remains in effect until 200 AM EDT for southeastern
Michigan.

TORNADO...POSSIBLE
HAIL THREAT...RADAR INDICATED
